sections.paragraph:
- Original: χρυσίον

- Transliteration: Chrusion

- Phonetic: khroo-see'-on

- Definition:

1. gold, both that which lies imbedded in the earth and is dug out of it

2. that which has been smelted and wrought

a. of a gold coin

b. of golden ornaments

c. of precious things made of gold

- Origin: diminutive of G5557

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Diminutive of G5557; a golden article that is gold plating ornament or coin: - gold.
